news.title:
QBE Insurance to acquire 51% stake in Raheja QBE for Rs 324 cr, ending JV with Rajan Raheja Group.
Thermax increases Exactspace stake to 51% for Rs 30.48 cr; ADM acquires CCS Advance Tech for precision machining.
news.summary:
QBE Insurance to acquire 51% stake in Raheja QBE for Rs 324 cr, ending JV with Rajan Raheja Group.
Thermax increases Exactspace stake to 51% for Rs 30.48 cr; ADM acquires CCS Advance Tech for precision machining.

news.title:
Thermax Ltd to acquire 35.83% stake in Exactspace, increasing shareholding to 51%, making Exactspace its subsidiary.
Acquisition worth Rs. 30.48 crore will expand Thermax's AI-based industrial IoT solutions for manufacturing customers.
news.summary:
Thermax Ltd to acquire 35.83% stake in Exactspace, increasing shareholding to 51%, making Exactspace its subsidiary.
Acquisition worth Rs. 30.48 crore will expand Thermax's AI-based industrial IoT solutions for manufacturing customers.

news.title:
SC orders RCF to refund ₹218cr plus 6% interest to Thermax Ltd.
RCF's appeal to retain ₹218cr was dismissed, upholding Bombay HC's decision.
news.summary:
SC orders RCF to refund ₹218cr plus 6% interest to Thermax Ltd.
RCF's appeal to retain ₹218cr was dismissed, upholding Bombay HC's decision.

news.title:
Thermax Ltd released Q3 FY25-26 analyst call transcript on Feb 5, 2026.
Transcript offers insights into quarterly performance and outlook, available on its website.
news.summary:
Thermax Ltd released Q3 FY25-26 analyst call transcript on Feb 5, 2026.
Transcript offers insights into quarterly performance and outlook, available on its website.

news.title:
Thermax observes order revival and anticipates a push with big data center projects.
CEO Ashish Bhandari highlights business prospects in Q3.
news.summary:
Thermax observes order revival and anticipates a push with big data center projects.
CEO Ashish Bhandari highlights business prospects in Q3.

news.title:
Thermax Ltd's subsidiaries, Jalansar Wind Energy and Kanakal Wind Energy, announce a merger under Section 233 of Companies Act.
The merger aims to enhance synergies, reduce compliance costs, and consolidate renewable energy businesses with a 1:1 share exchange ratio.
news.summary:
Thermax Ltd's subsidiaries, Jalansar Wind Energy and Kanakal Wind Energy, announce a merger under Section 233 of Companies Act.
The merger aims to enhance synergies, reduce compliance costs, and consolidate renewable energy businesses with a 1:1 share exchange ratio.

news.title:
Thermax Ltd reported Q3 FY25-26 revenue of Rs 10,389 crore.
Key orders included boilers for Nigeria's Dangote; noted exceptional profit gains.
news.summary:
Thermax Ltd reported Q3 FY25-26 revenue of Rs 10,389 crore.
Key orders included boilers for Nigeria's Dangote; noted exceptional profit gains.

news.title:
Thermax Q3 EBITDA rose to ₹2.54B, up from ₹1.89B YoY.
EBITDA margin improved to 9.6% from 7.5% YoY.
news.summary:
Thermax Q3 EBITDA rose to ₹2.54B, up from ₹1.89B YoY.
EBITDA margin improved to 9.6% from 7.5% YoY.

news.title:
Thermax partners with HPCL to develop clean energy projects, including HP AEM electrolyzers and CO₂ capture technologies.
The collaboration also focuses on bio-pyrolysis oil processing for sustainable energy solutions.
news.summary:
Thermax partners with HPCL to develop clean energy projects, including HP AEM electrolyzers and CO₂ capture technologies.
The collaboration also focuses on bio-pyrolysis oil processing for sustainable energy solutions.

news.title:
Thermax's subsidiary TBWES launches a new energy solutions firm in Saudi Arabia.
The firm is a fully owned step-down subsidiary of Thermax Limited.
news.summary:
Thermax's subsidiary TBWES launches a new energy solutions firm in Saudi Arabia.
The firm is a fully owned step-down subsidiary of Thermax Limited.

news.title:
CRISIL reaffirms Thermax Ltd's ratings with a stable outlook.
Bank loan facilities rating increased to Rs 5500 crore from Rs 4270 crore.
news.summary:
CRISIL reaffirms Thermax Ltd's ratings with a stable outlook.
Bank loan facilities rating increased to Rs 5500 crore from Rs 4270 crore.

news.title:
Thermax Ltd received a CARE A1 credit rating for its commercial papers from CareEdge Ratings.
The rating highlights Thermax's strong market position, financial profile, and 19% CAGR growth in FY22-FY25.
news.summary:
Thermax Ltd received a CARE A1 credit rating for its commercial papers from CareEdge Ratings.
The rating highlights Thermax's strong market position, financial profile, and 19% CAGR growth in FY22-FY25.

news.title:
Capital goods sector depends on govt orders and overseas business as private sector investment remains flat.
Public sector allocations in FY27 Budget are unlikely to see significant increases.
news.summary:
Capital goods sector depends on govt orders and overseas business as private sector investment remains flat.
Public sector allocations in FY27 Budget are unlikely to see significant increases.

news.title: Thermax celebrates 60 years and observes green shoots in private capex.
news.summary: Thermax celebrates 60 years and observes green shoots in private capex.

news.title: Thermax marks 60 years, highlights continued international project pipeline for Q3 & Q4.
news.summary: Thermax marks 60 years, highlights continued international project pipeline for Q3 & Q4.

news.title:
Thermax expects 15–20% growth driven by strong order pipeline, says CEO Ashish Bhandari.
The company secured a large order from Dangote in Africa and sees opportunities in ME, Africa, and US.
news.summary:
Thermax expects 15–20% growth driven by strong order pipeline, says CEO Ashish Bhandari.
The company secured a large order from Dangote in Africa and sees opportunities in ME, Africa, and US.

news.title:
Thermax plans to expand its Floating Energy Power Plant (FEPL) capacity to 1GW.
The company aims to onboard a suitable partner to support this initiative.
news.summary:
Thermax plans to expand its Floating Energy Power Plant (FEPL) capacity to 1GW.
The company aims to onboard a suitable partner to support this initiative.

news.title: Thermax plans to invest over ₹100 crore in its hydrogen business over the next few years.
news.summary: Thermax plans to invest over ₹100 crore in its hydrogen business over the next few years.

news.title:
Thermax Ltd's subsidiary FEPL sold its 100% stake in OTEPL back to the original seller due to unmet conditions.
The sale agreement was signed on Jan 3, 2026, for Rs 1 lakh, with completion expected within 30 days.
news.summary:
Thermax Ltd's subsidiary FEPL sold its 100% stake in OTEPL back to the original seller due to unmet conditions.
The sale agreement was signed on Jan 3, 2026, for Rs 1 lakh, with completion expected within 30 days.

news.title:
Thermax Ltd has incorporated a new wholly owned step-down subsidiary, First Energy 15 Pvt Ltd.
The subsidiary, in the renewable energy sector, has a paid-up capital of Rs. 1 lakh and no business yet.
news.summary:
Thermax Ltd has incorporated a new wholly owned step-down subsidiary, First Energy 15 Pvt Ltd.
The subsidiary, in the renewable energy sector, has a paid-up capital of Rs. 1 lakh and no business yet.
